summary: Classified all five hydrated open PRs independently as non-closure inventory items. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive item was detected, and no mutating close/merge/fix action is recommended in plan mode.

actions.reason: Distinct focused PR with supplied proof; not closable or mergeable by this inventory shard.
